channel.title: Fab Tabs Shop Notes
channel.description: Fitment guides, build notes, and fabrication know-how from Fab Tabs — garage-built chopper parts.

item.title: 3-Bolt vs. Single-Bolt Exhaust Flange: What Actually Matters
item.description: Both hold a pipe on. They don't hold up the same way, and they don't fit the same builds. Here's how to pick the right one before you're stuck grinding off a bad weld.
